name: clawdcursor
desc: clawdcursor compiles whatever's on screen into one UI map — accessibility tree and OCR fused into stable, addressable elements, with a screenshot only when nee…
descFull: clawdcursor compiles whatever's on screen into one UI map — accessibility tree and OCR fused into stable, addressable elements, with a screenshot only when needed — then drives apps through reusable scripts, verifying every action and routing it through a single safety gate.
